message: 2D plan processed into grayscale, segmented layout, inferred openings, and 3D wall geometry.
explanations: W1 is treated as load-bearing because it sits on the outer structural envelope or has a heavier wall thickness. Red Brick ranks highest here for balanced strength and cost.
